title: Opt: inc with concatenated constant zero

features.name: increment operation with constant zero LSB in operand
features.description: Code should include an add operation where one operand has a constant zero as the least significant bit concatenated with other bits, and the other operand is a single-bit increment value
features.snippet:
wire [2:0] a = {bit1, bit0, 1'b0};
wire [2:0] y = a + 3'd1;
